author: Brent Rossow
releaseNotes: Community fork of Markus Liljergren's archived oh-lalabs driver. Bug fixes: critical hasPressure logic bug (all models showed pressure UI), lumi.sens not normalized on refresh, hasPressure not updated via parse(), Keen fingerprint wrong manufacturer, pressure preference mislabeled, temperature bounds hardcoded. Improvements: batteryVoltage attribute, battery % clamped to [0,100], configurable temp/humidity reporting thresholds, pressure sanity bounds, ~1100 lines of dead code removed.
